steps.title: Use the ink placement
steps.content: The goal is to clearly contrast intaglio and relief printing. The relevant difference is where ink is applied: intaglio uses the grooved, carved parts of the block, while relief uses the raised, uncarved parts.

steps.title: Reject weak contrasts
steps.content: B identifies Mori's technique without explaining the general difference. C contrasts a relief detail with a feature shared by both methods. D states a similarity and wrongly says both place ink in grooves. The effective sentence directly opposes the two ink placements. The answer is A.
